SELECT
  time,
  (LEAD(bytes) OVER(ORDER BY time) - bytes) / (LEAD(time) OVER(ORDER BY time) - time) as Bandwidth
FROM (
  SELECT 
    timestamp / 1000000 as time,
    (extra_data#>>'{decoder,bytes}')::bigint as bytes
  FROM stats
  WHERE
    $__unixEpochNanoFilter(timestamp * 1000)
)

SELECT
  timestamp / 1000000 as time,
  (extra_data->>'uptime')::bigint as Uptime
FROM stats
WHERE
  $__unixEpochNanoFilter(timestamp * 1000)

SELECT
  timestamp / 1000000 as time,
  (extra_data#>>'{decoder,max_pkt_size}')::bigint as "Maximum packet size",
  (extra_data#>>'{decoder,avg_pkt_size}')::bigint as "Average packet size"
FROM stats
WHERE
  $__unixEpochNanoFilter(timestamp * 1000)

SELECT
  timestamp / 1000000 as time,
  (extra_data#>>'{tcp,memuse}')::bigint as TCP,
  (extra_data#>>'{tcp,reassembly_memuse}')::bigint as "TCP reassembly",
  (extra_data#>>'{flow,memuse}')::bigint as Flow,
  (extra_data#>>'{defrag,memuse}')::bigint as Defragmentation,
  (extra_data#>>'{http,memuse}')::bigint as HTTP,
  (extra_data#>>'{http,byterange,memuse}')::bigint as "HTTP byterange",
  (extra_data#>>'{ippair,memuse}')::bigint as "IP pair",
  (extra_data#>>'{host,memuse}')::bigint as Host
FROM stats
WHERE
  $__unixEpochNanoFilter(timestamp * 1000)

SELECT
  timestamp / 1000000 as time,
  (extra_data#>>'{detect,engines,0,rules_loaded}')::bigint as "Rules Loaded",
  (extra_data#>>'{detect,engines,0,rules_skipped}')::bigint as "Rules Skipped",
  (extra_data#>>'{detect,engines,0,rules_failed}')::bigint as "Rules Failed"
FROM stats
WHERE
  $__unixEpochNanoFilter(timestamp * 1000)

SELECT
  time,
  (LEAD(decoder_tcp) OVER(ORDER BY time) - decoder_tcp) / (LEAD(time) OVER(ORDER BY time) - time) as TCP,
  (LEAD(decoder_udp) OVER(ORDER BY time) - decoder_udp) / (LEAD(time) OVER(ORDER BY time) - time) as UDP,
  (LEAD(decoder_icmpv4) OVER(ORDER BY time) - decoder_icmpv4) / (LEAD(time) OVER(ORDER BY time) - time) as ICMPv4,
  (LEAD(decoder_icmpv6) OVER(ORDER BY time) - decoder_icmpv6) / (LEAD(time) OVER(ORDER BY time) - time) as ICMPv6
FROM (
  SELECT 
    timestamp / 1000000 as time,
    (extra_data#>>'{decoder,tcp}')::bigint as decoder_tcp,
    (extra_data#>>'{decoder,udp}')::bigint as decoder_udp,
    (extra_data#>>'{decoder,icmpv4}')::bigint as decoder_icmpv4,
    (extra_data#>>'{decoder,icmpv6}')::bigint as decoder_icmpv6
  FROM stats
  WHERE
    $__unixEpochNanoFilter(timestamp * 1000)
)

SELECT
  time,
  (LEAD(detect_alert) OVER(ORDER BY time) - detect_alert) / (LEAD(time) OVER(ORDER BY time) - time) as Alerts,
  (LEAD(detect_alerts_suppressed) OVER(ORDER BY time) - detect_alerts_suppressed) / (LEAD(time) OVER(ORDER BY time) - time) as "Alerts suppressed"
FROM (
  SELECT
    timestamp / 1000000 as time,
    (extra_data#>>'{detect,alert}')::bigint as detect_alert,
    (extra_data#>>'{detect,alerts_suppressed}')::bigint as detect_alerts_suppressed
  FROM stats
  WHERE
    $__unixEpochNanoFilter(timestamp * 1000)
)

SELECT
  time,
  (LEAD(state_new) OVER(ORDER BY time) - state_new) / (LEAD(time) OVER(ORDER BY time) - time) as New,
  (LEAD(state_established) OVER(ORDER BY time) - state_established) / (LEAD(time) OVER(ORDER BY time) - time) as Established,
  (LEAD(state_closed) OVER(ORDER BY time) - state_closed) / (LEAD(time) OVER(ORDER BY time) - time) as Closed
FROM (
  SELECT
    timestamp / 1000000 as time,
    (extra_data#>>'{flow,end,state,new}')::bigint as state_new,
    (extra_data#>>'{flow,end,state,established}')::bigint as state_established,
    (extra_data#>>'{flow,end,state,closed}')::bigint as state_closed
  FROM stats
  WHERE
    $__unixEpochNanoFilter(timestamp * 1000)
)

SELECT
  time,
  (LEAD(tcp_syn) OVER(ORDER BY time) - tcp_syn) / (LEAD(time) OVER(ORDER BY time) - time) as SYN,
  (LEAD(tcp_synack) OVER(ORDER BY time) - tcp_synack) / (LEAD(time) OVER(ORDER BY time) - time) as SYNACK,
  (LEAD(tcp_rst) OVER(ORDER BY time) - tcp_rst) / (LEAD(time) OVER(ORDER BY time) - time) as RST,
  (LEAD(tcp_urg) OVER(ORDER BY time) - tcp_urg) / (LEAD(time) OVER(ORDER BY time) - time) as URG
FROM (
  SELECT
    timestamp / 1000000 as time,
    (extra_data#>>'{tcp,syn}')::bigint as tcp_syn,
    (extra_data#>>'{tcp,synack}')::bigint as tcp_synack,
    (extra_data#>>'{tcp,rst}')::bigint as tcp_rst,
    (extra_data#>>'{tcp,urg}')::bigint as tcp_urg
  FROM stats
  WHERE
    $__unixEpochNanoFilter(timestamp * 1000)
)

SELECT

  (LEAD(wrk_spare_sync) OVER(ORDER BY time) - wrk_spare_sync) / (LEAD(time) OVER(ORDER BY time) - time) as spare_sync,
  (LEAD(wrk_spare_sync_incomplete) OVER(ORDER BY time) - wrk_spare_sync_incomplete) / (LEAD(time) OVER(ORDER BY time) - time) as spare_sync_incomplete,
  (LEAD(wrk_spare_sync_empty) OVER(ORDER BY time) - wrk_spare_sync_empty) / (LEAD(time) OVER(ORDER BY time) - time) as spare_sync_empty,
  (LEAD(wrk_flows_evicted_needs_work) OVER(ORDER BY time) - wrk_flows_evicted_needs_work) / (LEAD(time) OVER(ORDER BY time) - time) as flows_evicted_needs_work,
  (LEAD(wrk_flows_evicted_pkt_inject) OVER(ORDER BY time) - wrk_flows_evicted_pkt_inject) / (LEAD(time) OVER(ORDER BY time) - time) as flows_evicted_pkt_inject,

  (LEAD(wrk_flows_injected_max) OVER(ORDER BY time) - wrk_flows_injected_max) / (LEAD(time) OVER(ORDER BY time) - time) as flows_injected_max
FROM (
  SELECT
    timestamp / 1000000 as time,
    (extra_data#>>'{flow,wrk,spare_sync_avg}')::bigint as wrk_spare_sync_avg,
    (extra_data#>>'{flow,wrk,spare_sync}')::bigint as wrk_spare_sync,

    (extra_data#>>'{flow,wrk,flows_evicted_needs_work}')::bigint as wrk_flows_evicted_needs_work,
    (extra_data#>>'{flow,wrk,flows_evicted_pkt_inject}')::bigint as wrk_flows_evicted_pkt_inject,
    (extra_data#>>'{flow,wrk,flows_evicted}')::bigint as wrk_flows_evicted,
    (extra_data#>>'{flow,wrk,flows_injected}')::bigint as wrk_flows_injected,

  FROM stats

SELECT
  time,
  (LEAD(tcp_ssn_memcap_drop) OVER(ORDER BY time) - tcp_ssn_memcap_drop) / (LEAD(time) OVER(ORDER BY time) - time) as "ssn_memcap_drop",
  (LEAD(tcp_invalid_checksum) OVER(ORDER BY time) - tcp_invalid_checksum) / (LEAD(time) OVER(ORDER BY time) - time) as "invalid_checksum",
  (LEAD(tcp_midstream_pickups) OVER(ORDER BY time) - tcp_midstream_pickups) / (LEAD(time) OVER(ORDER BY time) - time) as "midstream_pickups",
  (LEAD(tcp_pkt_on_wrong_thread) OVER(ORDER BY time) - tcp_pkt_on_wrong_thread) / (LEAD(time) OVER(ORDER BY time) - time) as "pkt_on_wrong_thread",
  (LEAD(tcp_ack_unseen_data) OVER(ORDER BY time) - tcp_ack_unseen_data) / (LEAD(time) OVER(ORDER BY time) - time) as "ack_unseen_data",
  (LEAD(tcp_segment_memcap_drop) OVER(ORDER BY time) - tcp_segment_memcap_drop) / (LEAD(time) OVER(ORDER BY time) - time) as "segment_memcap_drop",
  (LEAD(tcp_stream_depth_reached) OVER(ORDER BY time) - tcp_stream_depth_reached) / (LEAD(time) OVER(ORDER BY time) - time) as "stream_depth_reached",
  (LEAD(tcp_reassembly_gap) OVER(ORDER BY time) - tcp_reassembly_gap) / (LEAD(time) OVER(ORDER BY time) - time) as "reassembly_gap",
  (LEAD(tcp_overlap_diff_data) OVER(ORDER BY time) - tcp_overlap_diff_data) / (LEAD(time) OVER(ORDER BY time) - time) as "overlap_diff_data",
  (LEAD(tcp_insert_data_normal_fail) OVER(ORDER BY time) - tcp_insert_data_normal_fail) / (LEAD(time) OVER(ORDER BY time) - time) as "insert_data_normal_fail",
  (LEAD(tcp_insert_data_overlap_fail) OVER(ORDER BY time) - tcp_insert_data_overlap_fail) / (LEAD(time) OVER(ORDER BY time) - time) as "insert_data_overlap_fail",
  (LEAD(tcp_urgent_oob_data) OVER(ORDER BY time) - tcp_urgent_oob_data) / (LEAD(time) OVER(ORDER BY time) - time) as "urgent_oob_data"
FROM (
  SELECT
    timestamp / 1000000 as time,
    (extra_data#>>'{tcp,ssn_memcap_drop}')::bigint as tcp_ssn_memcap_drop,
    (extra_data#>>'{tcp,invalid_checksum}')::bigint as tcp_invalid_checksum,
    (extra_data#>>'{tcp,midstream_pickups}')::bigint as tcp_midstream_pickups,
    (extra_data#>>'{tcp,pkt_on_wrong_thread}')::bigint as tcp_pkt_on_wrong_thread,
    (extra_data#>>'{tcp,ack_unseen_data}')::bigint as tcp_ack_unseen_data,
    (extra_data#>>'{tcp,segment_memcap_drop}')::bigint as tcp_segment_memcap_drop,
    (extra_data#>>'{tcp,stream_depth_reached}')::bigint as tcp_stream_depth_reached,
    (extra_data#>>'{tcp,reassembly_gap}')::bigint as tcp_reassembly_gap,
    (extra_data#>>'{tcp,overlap_diff_data}')::bigint as tcp_overlap_diff_data,
    (extra_data#>>'{tcp,insert_data_normal_fail}')::bigint as tcp_insert_data_normal_fail,
    (extra_data#>>'{tcp,insert_data_overlap_fail}')::bigint as tcp_insert_data_overlap_fail,
    (extra_data#>>'{tcp,urgent_oob_data}')::bigint as tcp_urgent_oob_data
  FROM stats
  WHERE
    $__unixEpochNanoFilter(timestamp * 1000)
)
